summary: Inventory API and Kit Templates with Inventory Support - All features verified and working. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing: 3 Inventar-Artikel (USB-C Kabel 1m: 50x, HDMI Adapter: 25x, Displayport Kabel 2m: 30x), 5 Kategorien (Hardware, Kabel, Adapter, Zubehör, Verbrauchsmaterial), 2 Kit-Vorlagen
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory API fully functional. Kit Templates now support both device (with SN) and inventory (without SN) components. All CRUD operations working for items and categories.

details: GET /api/inventory/items - List all items with summary
Filter by category and search working

3_lagerverwaltung_inventar_tab.description: Lagerverwaltung->Inventar Tab zeigt Artikel mit Kategorien und 'Neuer Artikel' Button
details: Summary cards: Gesamt Artikel (3), Niedriger Bestand (0), Nicht verfügbar (0)
'Geräte (mit SN)' tab shows device types with availability counts
'Inventar-Artikel' tab shows inventory items with quantities
Both tabs allow adding components to kit template

5_kit_vorlagen_inventar_artikel_tab.description: Kit-Vorlagen: Inventar-Artikel Tab zeigt verfügbare Artikel mit Stückzahlen
details: Shows 3 inventory items: Displayport Kabel 2m (30), HDMI Adapter (25), USB-C Kabel 1m (50)

6_kit_components_mixed_types.description: Kit-Vorlagen: Komponenten können beide Typen enthalten (source: device oder inventory)
details: Kit templates can have device components (source: 'device')
Kit templates can have inventory components (source: 'inventory')
Availability calculation works for both types
API supports creating/updating templates with mixed components

test_classes: TestInventoryItemsAPI (8 tests) - CRUD operations for items
TestInventoryCategoriesAPI (6 tests) - CRUD operations for categories
TestKitTemplatesWithInventory (4 tests) - Kit templates with inventory support

ui_elements_verified: 4 sub-tabs in Lagerverwaltung (Inventar, Wareneingang, Geräte-Lager, Kit-Vorlagen)
Inventar summary cards (Gesamt Artikel, Niedriger Bestand, Nicht verfügbar)
Kit-Vorlagen summary cards (Geräte im Lager: 4, Inventar-Artikel: 3, Kit-Vorlagen: 2)
Kit template cards with availability badges
'Neue Vorlage' modal with two tabs (Geräte mit SN, Inventar-Artikel)
Inventory items in modal showing quantities
